parameters.query: SELECT id, source_id, title, url, content_hash, target_page, target_section, priority FROM fafo_law_sources WHERE active = true ORDER BY priority DESC;

=INSERT INTO fafo_law_changes (source_id, change_type, new_content_hash, summary, severity, affected_pages, impact_assessment, updated_html, recommendations, session_id, status) VALUES ((SELECT id FROM fafo_law_sources WHERE source_id = '{{ $json.sourceId }}'), 'content_modified', '{{ $json.newHash }}', '{{ $json.summary }}', '{{ $json.severity }}', '{{ $json.affectedPages }}'::jsonb, '{{ $json.impactAssessment }}', {{ $json.updatedHtml ? "'" + $json.updatedHtml + "'" : "NULL" }}, '{{ $json.recommendations }}', '{{ $json.sessionId }}', 'pending_approval') RETURNING id;
